gold.title: Stories Carousel
gold.reason: Instagram-style stories carousel with video support and avatars — visually impressive and directly elevates marketing/social sections.

gold.title: Avatar Picker
gold.reason: Animated avatar picker with polished interaction — great for onboarding flows and profile sections on business sites.

gold.title: Avatar Group with Tooltip
gold.reason: Interactive avatar group with hover tooltips — classic social proof element that immediately elevates landing pages.

gold.title: Animated Tooltip
gold.reason: Animated tooltip on avatar hover — polished micro-interaction ideal for team/contributor sections.

gold.title: Orbiting Avatars
gold.reason: Orbital animation of avatars — visually stunning hero decoration for SaaS and marketing sites.

gold.title: Avatar
gold.reason: Full-featured avatar with multiple sizes, border radius variants, and group stacking — production-ready component suite.

gold.title: Animated List
gold.reason: Animated list with avatar entries — smooth entrance animations that elevate notification/activity feed sections.

gold.title: Personal Landing
gold.reason: Polished personal landing section with avatar presentation — works great for about/team sections on marketing sites.

gold.title: Avatar Smart Group
gold.reason: Smart avatar grouping with overflow handling — sophisticated social proof widget for hero sections.

gold.title: Avatar Uploader
gold.reason: Drag-and-drop avatar upload with preview — polished UX component for profile and onboarding pages.

silver.title: Avatar Group
silver.reason: Solid avatar group with overlap stacking — useful but straightforward without distinguishing animations.

silver.title: Avatar Hover Card
silver.reason: Hover card on avatar — functional pattern but common; lacks visual distinction.

silver.title: Avatar With Name
silver.reason: Avatar paired with name label — clean and reusable for team/author sections.

silver.title: Avatar Group
silver.reason: Another avatar group implementation — good quality but similar to others in the set.

silver.title: Avatar
silver.reason: Stacked avatars with group semantics — well-described and useful for social proof.

silver.title: Avatar Badge
silver.reason: Avatar with status badge overlay — useful for presence indicators in team sections.

silver.title: Ruixen Contributors Table
silver.reason: Contributors table with avatars — good for open-source project pages and team displays.

silver.title: Mail Checker Input
silver.reason: Mail input with avatar suggestion — useful for invite flows but niche.

silver.title: Comments
silver.reason: Comment thread with avatars — solid blog/community component but app-leaning.

silver.title: Avatar
silver.reason: Clean avatar component — standard implementation with good fallback handling.

silver.title: Avatar One
silver.reason: Single avatar variant with styling — useful baseline component.

silver.title: Fallback Avatar One
silver.reason: Fallback avatar with initials — clean but covers a narrow edge case.

bronze.title: Basic Avatar
bronze.reason: Thin wrapper around shadcn avatar — adds no meaningful value above the primitive.

bronze.title: Avatar 2
bronze.reason: Generic avatar variant with no distinguishing features.

bronze.title: Avatar 1
bronze.reason: Basic avatar implementation — minimal above shadcn primitive.

bronze.title: Avatar
bronze.reason: Simple avatar with no notable enhancement.

bronze.title: Avatar 1
bronze.reason: Base UI primitive avatar — foundational but not visually impressive for website redesign.

bronze.title: Avatar Square
bronze.reason: Square variant only — too narrow in scope to justify Gold/Silver.

bronze.title: Base Avatar 1
bronze.reason: Base-level avatar with no animation or group features.

bronze.title: Avatar
bronze.reason: Raw shadcn/ui avatar primitive — included in the registry but too basic on its own.

bronze.title: Avatar 1
bronze.reason: Standard avatar — no notable enhancement over the base component.

bronze.title: Select
bronze.reason: Select input misclassified in avatars folder — not an avatar component.

bronze.title: Popover
bronze.reason: Popover misclassified in avatars folder — not an avatar component.
